name: jf-skills
description: Author, submit, referee, and revise for The Journal of Finance (JF), the American Finance Association flagship (est. 1946, Wiley-Blackwell). Encodes JF-specific mechanics: the AFA portal and tiered submission fee, the 60-page limit, the Internet Appendix bundled in the same PDF, the Data and Code Sharing Policy and Data Editor, and general-interest positioning across the finance top-3. Bilingual en / zh-CN docs; Stata / R / Python pointers.
